_comment: Project-scoped Claude Code settings for the Urfael vault. The Stop hook speaks the reply via ElevenLabs when you run `claude` directly in this vault (the overlay/daemon does its own TTS and sets URFAEL_OVERLAY=1 to suppress this).
_security: permissions.deny is a HARD boundary in Claude Code: it beats allow rules AND the permission mode (acceptEdits/bypassPermissions), and a Read() deny also covers Grep/Glob. Every claude session the daemon spawns runs in this vault, so these rules block the AGENT (heartbeat, cron, jobs, distill, even a YOLO turn) from reading your credential stores — so a prompt-injected instruction to 'read a secret and send it out' has nothing to read. The daemon still reads bridge.env via Node fs; this only constrains the model's file tools.
